contentText: In-depth expertise in software engineering with a focus on data and security engineering, as well as specialization in software security engineering. Extensive knowledge of software project management, software architectures, development processes, and requirements engineering.
Versatile education in computer science in the areas of: software engineering, databases, communication technology, performance-oriented programming, mathematics und logic.
Technical education at the electronics and technical computer science department with a focus on: designing hardware, developing software and managing networks.

subContent.title: Diploma Thesis
subContent.content: Redesign of the HTL Anichstraße school website and redevelopment of the HTL iOS app.
